name: peach-guitar-tuner
description: Static Peach guitar tuner PWA with optional global tuning API backend.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check config.js && node --check server/tuning-utils.js && node --check server/tuning-store.js && node --check server/ai-lookup.js && node --check server/tuning-api.js && node --check server/start.js && node --check dev/global-tuning-api-mock.js && node --check netlify/functions/tunings-search.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/health.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/config-js.mjs && node --check tests/global-tuning-api.test.js && node --check tests/netlify-functions.test.js
